day.title: Day
day.description: Day when the resilience record was recorded.

tag_type_code.title: Tag Type Code
tag_type_code.description: The unique code of the selected tag type, `NULL` for text-only tags, or `custom` for custom tag types.

start_time.description: Timestamp of the tag (if no duration) or the start time of the tag (with duration).

end_time.description: Timestamp of the tag's end for events with duration or `NULL` if there is no duration.

start_day.title: Start Day
start_day.description: Day of the tag (if no duration) or the start day of the tag (with duration).

end_day.title: End Day
end_day.description: Day of the tag's end for events with duration or `NULL` if there is no duration.

comment.title: Comment
comment.description: Additional freeform text on the tag.

custom_name.title: Custom Name
custom_name.description: The name of the tag if the tag_type_code is `custom`.

EnhancedTagModel.title: EnhancedTagModel
EnhancedTagModel.description:
An EnhancedTagModel maps an ASSATag. An ASSATag in ExtAPIV2 is called a EnhancedTag
An EnhancedTagModel will be populated by data from an ASSATag
The fields in the EnhancedTagModel map to fields in an ASSATag

LongTermResilienceLevel.title: LongTermResilienceLevel
LongTermResilienceLevel.description: Possible long term resilience level values.

updated_at.description: Timestamp indicating when the object was last updated.

Metadata.title: Metadata
Metadata.description: Object defining the metadata of a collection model instance.

meet_daily_targets.description: Contribution of meeting previous 7-day daily activity targets in range [1, 100].

move_every_hour.description: Contribution of previous 24-hour inactivity alerts in range [1, 100].

recovery_time.description: Contribution of previous 7-day recovery time in range [1, 100].

stay_active.description: Contribution of previous 24-hour activity in range [1, 100].

training_frequency.description: Contribution of previous 7-day exercise frequency in range [1, 100].

training_volume.description: Contribution of previous 7-day exercise volume in range [1, 100].

class_5_min.description:
5-minute activity classification for the period where every character corresponds to:
'0' = non wear
'1' = rest
'2' = inactive
'3' = low activity
'4' = medium activity
'5' = high activity
Example: "001233334555524001".

day.description: Day that the daily activity belong to.

equivalent_walking_distance.description: Equivalent walking distance of energe expenditure in meters.

high_activity_met_minutes.description: The total METs of each minute classified as high activity.

high_activity_time.description: The total time in seconds of each minute classified as high activity.

low_activity_met_minutes.description: The total METs of each minute classified as low activity.

low_activity_time.description: The total time in seconds of each minute classified as low activity.

medium_activity_met_minutes.description: The total METs of each minute classified as medium activity.

medium_activity_time.description: The total time in seconds of each minute classified as medium activity.

PublicDailyActivity.title: PublicDailyActivity
PublicDailyActivity.description: Object defining a daily activity that is a 24-hour period starting at 4 a.m.

day.description: Day that the prediction belongs to.

contributors.description: Contributors of the daily readiness score.

day.description: Day that the daily readiness belongs to.

temperature_trend_deviation.description: Temperature trend deviation in degrees Celcius.

contributors.description: Contributors for the daily sleep score.

day.description: Day that the daily sleep belongs to.

breathing_disturbance_index.description: Breathing Disturbance Index (BDI) calculated using detected SpO2 drops from timeseries. Values should be in range [0, 100]

day.description: Day that the spo2 values belong to.

spo2_percentage.description: The daily SpO2 percentage value aggregates. Sourced from SpO2 percentage timeseries values.

day.description: Day that the daily stress belongs to.

recovery_high.description: Time spent in a high recovery zone (bottom quartile data) in seconds.

stress_high.description: Time spent in a high stress zone (top quartile of data) in seconds.

PublicDailyStressSummary.title: PublicDailyStressSummary
PublicDailyStressSummary.description: Possible public daily stress summary types.

timestamp_unix.description: Timestamp of the discrete sample as unix time in milliseconds.

bpm.description: Heart rate as beats per minute.

timestamp_unix.description: Timestamp of the discrete sample as unix time in milliseconds.

ibi.description: Time between two consecutive beats of the heart, in milliseconds. Maximum value limited to 2000ms.

validity.description:
Validation classification: 1=Good,2=Bad,3=Corrected,-1/-2=Gap, 0=Raw(Uncorrected). The validity indicates
whether the data in this row is trustworthy. Gap: indicates that there was no available ppg signal in the
past seconds, which makes it impossible to compute the IBI for this row. Corrected: In rare cases the ring
algorithm produces artifacts that can be corrected during post-processing. An example is the ring algo
generating two IBI events when there should be a single one. If the IBI value was fixed in post-processing,
it will have this validity classification. If the IBI value was not fixed, it will have the Raw classification.

average_breath.description: Average breathing rate during sleep as breaths/minute.

average_heart_rate.description: Average heart rate during sleep as beats/minute. NOTE: this is the average calculated by ecore (based on 30-second samples) which is different from what is shown in the app. The app shows the average of aggregated 5-minute heart rate samples.

average_hrv.description: Average heart rate variability during sleep.

day.description: Day that the sleep belongs to.

deep_sleep_duration.description: Duration spent in deep sleep in seconds.

hrv.description: Object containing heart rate variability samples.

latency.description: Sleep latency in seconds. This is the time it took for the user to fall asleep after going to bed.

light_sleep_duration.description: Duration spent in light sleep in seconds.

low_battery_alert.description: Flag indicating if a low battery alert occurred.

lowest_heart_rate.description: Lowest heart rate during sleep. NOTE: this is the value calculated by ecore (based on 30-second samples) which is different from what is shown in the app. The app shows the minimum of aggregated 5-minute heart rate samples.

movement_30_sec.description:
30-second movement classification for the period where every character corresponds to:
'1' = no motion,
'2' = restless,
'3' = tossing and turning
'4' = active
Example: "1143222134".

readiness_score_delta.description: Effect on readiness score caused by this sleep period.

rem_sleep_duration.description: Duration spent in REM sleep in seconds.

restless_periods.description: Number of restless periods during sleep.

sleep_algorithm_version.description: Version of the sleep algorithm used to calculate the sleep data.

sleep_analysis_reason.description: The reason for the creation or update of the latest version of this sleep.

sleep_phase_30_sec.description:
30-second sleep phase classification for the period where every character corresponds to:
'1' = deep sleep,
'2' = light sleep,
'3' = REM sleep
'4' = awake.
Example: "444423323441114".

sleep_phase_5_min.description:
5-minute sleep phase classification for the period where every character corresponds to:
'1' = deep sleep,
'2' = light sleep,
'3' = REM sleep
'4' = awake.
Example: "444423323441114".

sleep_score_delta.description: Effect on sleep score caused by this sleep period.

time_in_bed.description: Duration spent in bed in seconds.

ring_id.title: Ring Id
ring_id.description: Encrypted identifier of the ring that produced this sleep data.

app_sleep_phase_5_min.title: App Sleep Phase 5 Min
app_sleep_phase_5_min.description:
5-minute sleep phase classification for the period aligned with what is shown in the app
        where every character corresponds to:
        '1' = deep sleep,
        '2' = light sleep,
        '3' = REM sleep
        '4' = awake.
        Example: "444423323441114".
        NOTE: This field will be removed in the future after a transition period.

temperature_trend_deviation.description: Temperature trend deviation in degrees Celcius.

activity_balance.description: Contribution of cumulative activity balance in range [1, 100].

body_temperature.description: Contribution of body temperature in range [1, 100].

hrv_balance.description: Contribution of heart rate variability balance in range [1, 100].

previous_day_activity.description: Contribution of previous day's activity in range [1, 100].

previous_night.description: Contribution of previous night's sleep in range [1, 100].

recovery_index.description: Contribution of recovery index in range [1, 100].

resting_heart_rate.description: Contribution of resting heart rate in range [1, 100].

sleep_balance.description: Contribution of sleep balance in range [1, 100].

sleep_regularity.description: Contribution of sleep regularity in range [1, 100].

timestamp.description: Timestamp indicating when the episode occurred.

PublicSleepType.title: PublicSleepType
PublicSleepType.description:
Possible sleep period types.
'deleted' = deleted sleep by user.
'sleep' = user confirmed sleep / nap, min 15 minutes, max 3 hours, contributes to daily scores
'late_nap' = user confirmed sleep / nap, min 15 minutes, ended after sleep day change (6 pm), contributes to next days daily scores
'long_sleep' = sleep that is long enough (>3h) to automatically contribute to daily scores
'rest' = Falsely detected sleep / nap, rejected in confirm prompt by user
